title: hymenophyllum corrugatum
intro: Hymenophyllum corrugatum, also known as the corrugated filmy fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum corrugatum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
